title: Rapid rural progress in Ethiopia has reduced the urban–rural gap, while the Democratic Republic of Congo and Nigeria have made limited progress
subtitle: People with access to electricity, by place of residence (% of population)
source: World Bank Group. “Access to electricity, rural (% of rural population),” “Access to electricity, urban (% of urban population).” SDG 7.1.1 Electrification Dataset.
visdescription: Three line charts showing electricity access between urban and rural areas in Ethiopia, Nigeria, and the Democratic Republic of Congo.
keyFactLabel: of rural dwellers in Ethiopia had access to electricity in 2023, up from just 2 percent in 2000.
